title: GenSearchConversation
description: A GenSearch conversation envelope returned by the Agent API. Created by askGenSearch and polled until 'progress' reaches 1.0; final markdown 'answer' carries inline citations into the AlphaSense corpus.

mode.description: GenSearch reasoning mode. 'deepResearch' triggers the long-horizon Deep Research agent.

progress.description: Completion progress. 1.0 indicates the answer is final.

answer.description: Markdown answer with inline citation markers.
